titleStmt.title: SII 31.84: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 84. (A.R. No. B 197 of 1938.) ANIMELA, KAMALAPURAM TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up in front of the temple of Saṅgamēśvarasvāmi.
It is dated in Śaka 1464, Śōbhakṛit, Bhādrapada, śu. 2, Monday (Wrong for Saturday) corresponding to August 12, 1542 A.D.

Records that two copper-plate charters registering the gifts of the villages namely Animela and Nandimangalam in one charter and Vēṁpalli and Poḷela in another charter obtained by Mahāmaṇḍlēśvara Guruvaya-Dēvachōḍamahārāja from the king through Śrī Rangarāja Rāmarāja. The above mentioned villages are situated in Ganḍikōṭa-sima, Doragamḍi-sima, Kudavaguḷa-sima and Nandimangaḷam respectively. These four villages which gifted away by him to the temple at Animela on the occasion of Śivarātri for the daily worship to the god Sangamēśvara situated at the confluence of the rivers Aghanāsini and Pāvani. The donor Guruvaya Dēva mahārāja is described as the son of Maṅgarāja and grandson of Bommarāja, of Kāśyapa-gōtra, Āpastambhaūtra, yajuś-śākha and Sūryavaṁsa. The gift is said to have been given in the presence of witnesses including two village goddess namely Aubhaḷamma and Yaramma and Pedasangarāju, Piṅsangarāju, Tammarāju, Rudra Rāju, Basavarāju, Peda Chitrāju, Pina Chitrāju, Poṭṭi Sangarāju, Rāha Sangarāju.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīkaṁṭhanāta(dha) .
śubhamastu . namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi caṁdra cāmaracāravē
trailōkyanagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svastiśrī jayā
bhyudaya śālivāhana śakavarṣaṁbulu 1465 Agunēṭī śō
bhakṛtu saṁvatsara bhādrapada śu 2 sōmavāraṁ śrīmadrājā
dhirāja rājaparamēśvara vīrapratāpa sadāśivadēvamahārā
yalu vidyānagaramaṁdu vajrasiṁhāsanārūḍhuṁḍai pṛ
dhivi sāmrājyaṁ cēyucunuṁḍagānu kāśyapagōtraṁ
Āpastaṁbha sūtraṁ yajuśmākhādhyāyulaina sūryavaṁśō
dbhavulaina śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara bōmmarājuṁ gāripautṛlaina ma
ṁgarājuṁgāri putṛlaina guruvayadēva cōḍamahārāja
luṁgāru tuṁgabhadrānadī tīramaṁdu śrīvirūpākṣa dēvuni
saṁnidhini śrīraṁgarāju rāmarājuṁgāri mūlana śrīsadā
śivadēva mahārāyala cāta reṁḍu tāmraśāsanālu puccukoniśrī
madanādi dēvadēvatāsārvabhauma saccidānaṁda paripūrna sapta
rṣivaraduṁḍaina Animela saṁgamēśvara dēvunigi Aubhaḷamma ya
ṟamma Anēdēvuḷlu Iddarunnu pedasaṁgarāju pinasaṁgarāju tammarā
jurudrarāju basvarāju pedaciṭi rāju pinaciṭirāju pōṭṭīsaṁgarāju pā
pasaṁgarāja Annatoṁmmaṁḍṛ kumāḷlu samīpastulai Uṁḍaṁgā
nu Aṣunāśili pāvani saṁgamasdhalāna śivarātri puṇyakālamaṁ
du sahiraṇyōdaka dānadhārā pūrvvakaṁgā dhāravōśi Iccina grā
mālu Animala naṁdimaṁgalālaku voka tāmraśāsanaṁ vēṁpalli
pōḷelaku voka tāmraśāsanaṁ gaṁḍikōṭa sīsulōnidi Animeladora
gaṁṭi sīmalōnidi pāḷaṁ kūḍanaguḷanisu lōnidi vēṁpalli naṁdimaṁ
galālu I nālugugrāmālaṁgala nidhi nikṣēpa jalapāṣaṇa A
kṣiṇi Āgāmi siddhasādhyālanēṭi Aṣṭhabhōgatējasvāmyalunnu dē
va bhōgyaṁgā samarpiṁci Aṁgaraṁga vaibhavālunnu ḍebaireṁḍu ni
yōgālunu nityanaimittika kāmōtsavāluṁnnu Ācaṁdrārkaṁgā sā
gē Aṭugā kaṭṭaḍa cēśi trīvācrakaṁgā dhāravōśi Iccina dharmaśilāśāsanaṁ
mu . svadattā dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānu pālanaṁ paradattāpa
harēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēt . svadattāṁ paradattā vā yō ha
rēta vasuṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭhivarṣa sahasrāṇa viṣṭhāyāṁ jā
yatēkrimiḥ . Ēkaipa bhaganī lōkēsarvvēṣāmēva bhūbhujāḥ
nabhōjyā nakaragrāhya dēvadattānu vasuṁdharā dāvasālana yō
rmathyē dānāchrēyōnu pālanaṁ dānātvyarga mahāpnōte pālānā
dacyutaṁ padaḥ śākēbhūtarasābdi caṁdragaṇitābdē śōbhakṛtṛu
jvapa rēkṣē bhādrapada dvitīyē tidhē yugvi vārē vidhōrguhanarā
di cāpajaya śrīsaṁgamēśāyastaṁbhaṁ
kaṁ didāccatu vōdru vaṁ racayitā grāman mahāvaibhavaṁ .
śrī śrī śrīṁ jēyusu
Digital edition of SII 31.84 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
